title: Microsoft Purview adaptive policy scopes
description: Desired state for adaptive policy scopes consumed by scripts/Deploy-AdaptiveScopes.ps1. See docs/adr/0034-adaptive-scope-schema.md. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchange/new-adaptivescope and https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/purview-adaptive-scopes

name.description: Unique scope identifier. The lab-as- prefix is the lab ownership marker required by issue #548 -- adaptive scopes are tenant-wide and the prefix makes lab provenance obvious in the M365 admin surface.

locationType.description: Scope membership shape. Immutable per Microsoft Learn -- changing it requires delete + recreate. ADR 0034 Decision 2 allowed-attribute set is User-only at present; Group and Site are TODO: probe required.

filterConditions.description: JSON string passed unchanged to New-AdaptiveScope -FilterConditions / Set-AdaptiveScope -FilterConditions. ADR 0034 Decision 1: the cmdlet rejects hashtable input at depth 1; only JSON string works. Shape: { "Conjunction": "And", "Conditions": [ { "Name": "<attr>", "Value": "<v>", "Operator": "Equals" } ] }. User-scope Name allowlist (probed 2026-06-05): Alias | Department | Title | Office | City. Reconciler validates well-formed JSON via Test-Json -Json $body; cmdlet is the source of truth for attribute-name and value validation.

comment.description: Optional human-readable note. Not tracked for drift; the reconciler does not write a tenant Comment field (New-AdaptiveScope has no -Comment parameter).
